name: The Anomalous Hour
short_description: You are alone in a deserted station. Or are you? Take pictures of strange anomalies around the station and you might find a way out.
detailed_description:
You are alone in a deserted station. Or are you? Take pictures of strange anomalies around the station and you might find a way out.

Use your camera and keep your eyes open.

Check every corner for anything strange. If you find an anomaly, take a picture quickly.

When you're ready, it's time to board the train.

And maybe you can finally go home.

The Anomalous Hour is a short horror-themed adventure/walking simulator taking place in a mysterious deserted subway station. The only way out is to take photos of the anomalies you find. Don't avert your eyes.

Playtime

15-60 minutes

Streaming Guidelines

・Streaming this game is permitted to both individuals and corporations without additional permission from Gambir Studio.
・Additionally, monetization of videos or streaming of this game is also likewise permitted
・Please kindly mention the name of the game in the title of your video or stream, and consider including a link to the Steam page in the video's description.

Gambir Studio is not liable for any damages caused by any content creation, including streaming, of this game.
These guidelines are subject to change without notice.
